description: Hand a target BMAD workflow to Otto. He plans, delegates, and answers HITL questions per your policy file. Pauses only on low confidence or always-pause categories.
Resume a paused autopilot run. Otto reloads the ledger, presents the pause card, and continues from the same chunk once you answer.
Open a session with Otto, the Autopilot Orchestrator. Useful for tweaking policy/budget or asking why he made a particular call.
